heroImageAlt: A supportive home visit conversation in a calm living room
heroShortDescription: Supporting you at home, when you need it most.
mainIntro1: Caring for someone with dementia can be rewarding, but it can also be tiring and emotionally demanding. You do not have to manage alone.
mainIntro2: Our Dementia Home Visiting Service offers friendly, supportive visits at home for people living with dementia, giving unpaid carers time to rest, attend appointments, or take a short break with peace of mind.
serviceHeading: What is the Dementia Home Visiting Service?
serviceIntro: The Dementia Home Visiting Service provides safe, friendly social visits for people living with dementia who live at home. Visits are provided by trained volunteers and are focused on companionship and meaningful engagement.
serviceOfferHeading: During a visit, volunteers can offer:

serviceOfferList.text: Meaningful activities such as reminiscence, music, reading or conversation

serviceOutro: These visits give carers the opportunity to step away for a short time, knowing their loved one is safe and supported.

whoList.text: Who live at home with an unpaid carer (family member or friend)
Where the carer would benefit from some respite or personal time

helpCards.title: For the individual living with dementia

bullets.text: Helps build trust, familiarity and routine
Time to rest and focus on your own wellbeing
Opportunity to attend appointments or run errands
Peace of mind knowing your loved one is not alone

importantList.text: Visits are social and supportive only
Volunteers do not provide personal care or administer medication
All volunteers are trained, supported and DBS checked

importantOutro: We understand that inviting someone into your home is a big step. Visits are planned carefully, risk assessed, and supported by our Clinical Lead and team.

flexList.text: Agree visit times and frequency that suit you
Ensure the service fits around your needs

referralsBody1: The Dementia Home Visiting Service is open to self-referrals and professional referrals. Carers, family members, or healthcare professionals are welcome to enquire.
referralsBody2: If you are unsure whether this service is right for you, please get in touch. We are always happy to talk things through and offer guidance.
referralOutro: and someone will get in touch with you to discuss in more detail.
sideFormHint: Enquire about dementia home-sitting or submit a referral.
